title: quercus lusitanica var. pedunculata
intro: Quercus lusitanica var. pedunculata is a variety of the Iberian oak tree, also known as the pedunculate oak, which is native to the western and central regions of the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. This tree is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus lusitanica var. pedunculata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
